scriptTask.name: Initialize context
scriptTask.script: execution.setVariable('route_mode', execution.getVariable('route_mode') ?: 'FLOWABLE') execution.setVariable('request_id', execution.getVariable('request_id') ?: '') execution.setVariable('customer_id', execution.getVariable('customer_id') ?: '') execution.setVariable('iin', execution.getVariable('iin') ?: '') execution.setVariable('external_applicant_id', execution.getVariable('external_applicant_id') ?: '') execution.setVariable('product_type', execution.getVariable('product_type') ?: '') execution.setVariable('applicant_json', execution.getVariable('applicant_json') ?: '{}')

scriptTask.name: Skip iSoftPull
Parse iSoftPull
scriptTask.script: def raw = (execution.getVariable('isoRawBody') ?: '{}') as String def mv = raw =~ /"status"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"/ execution.setVariable('iso_status', mv.find() ? mv.group(1) : 'OK')

scriptTask.name: Prepare Creditsafe body
scriptTask.script: def isoBody = (execution.getVariable('isoRawBody') ?: '{}') as String def body = '{"request_id":"' + execution.getVariable('request_id') + '",' + '"customer_id":"' + execution.getVariable('customer_id') + '",' + '"iin":"' + execution.getVariable('iin') + '",' + '"external_applicant_id":"' + execution.getVariable('external_applicant_id') + '",' + '"applicant":' + (execution.getVariable('applicant_json') ?: '{}') + ',' + '"isoftpull":' + isoBody + '}' execution.setVariable('creditsafe_request_body', body)

scriptTask.name: Skip Creditsafe
Parse Creditsafe
scriptTask.script: def raw = (execution.getVariable('csRawBody') ?: '{}') as String def mv = raw =~ /"status"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"/ execution.setVariable('creditsafe_status', mv.find() ? mv.group(1) : 'OK')

scriptTask.name: Prepare Plaid body
scriptTask.script: def csBody = (execution.getVariable('csRawBody') ?: '{}') as String def body = '{"request_id":"' + execution.getVariable('request_id') + '",' + '"customer_id":"' + execution.getVariable('customer_id') + '",' + '"iin":"' + execution.getVariable('iin') + '",' + '"external_applicant_id":"' + execution.getVariable('external_applicant_id') + '",' + '"applicant":' + (execution.getVariable('applicant_json') ?: '{}') + ',' + '"creditsafe":' + csBody + '}' execution.setVariable('plaid_request_body', body)

scriptTask.name: Skip Plaid
Parse Plaid
scriptTask.script: def raw = (execution.getVariable('plaidRawBody') ?: '{}') as String def mv = raw =~ /"status"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"/ execution.setVariable('plaid_status', mv.find() ? mv.group(1) : 'OK')

scriptTask.name: Prepare CRM body
scriptTask.script: def plaidBody = (execution.getVariable('plaidRawBody') ?: '{}') as String def body = '{"request_id":"' + execution.getVariable('request_id') + '",' + '"customer_id":"' + execution.getVariable('customer_id') + '",' + '"iin":"' + execution.getVariable('iin') + '",' + '"external_applicant_id":"' + execution.getVariable('external_applicant_id') + '",' + '"applicant":' + (execution.getVariable('applicant_json') ?: '{}') + ',' + '"plaid":' + plaidBody + '}' execution.setVariable('crm_request_body', body)

scriptTask.name: Skip CRM
Parse CRM
scriptTask.script: def raw = (execution.getVariable('crmRawBody') ?: '{}') as String def mv = raw =~ /"status"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"/ execution.setVariable('crm_status', mv.find() ? mv.group(1) : 'OK')

scriptTask.name: Finalize result
